---
name: AI Agent Hallucination / Confusion Report
about: Create a report if your AI agent failed to understand a protocol or hallucinated logic based on the skill docs.
title: "[AGENT-CONFUSION] "
labels: agent-feedback, bug
assignees: ''
---

**Which AI Agent was used?**
(e.g. Claude 3.5 Sonnet, GPT-4o, Gemini 1.5 Pro)

**Describe what the Agent got wrong**
A concise description of the hallucination or where the agent got stuck. Did it invent an XML tag? Did it misunderstand the barcode algorithm?

**Prompt or Code snippet**
What logic did the AI write or propose?

```typescript
// Add agent output here
```

**Proposed clarification**
What should be added to `SKILL.md` or the reference files to make the AI immediately understand the correct behavior next time?
